meta.title: America's new missile fires ITS OWN air-to-air missiles
meta.description:
DARPA’s Longshot is a concept that somehow stands out as unique, even among the ever-growing list of exotic new drone platforms in development and testing. 

At first glance, Longshot may look like any other large air-launched cruise missile; in fact, it’s even powered by the same turbojet you’ll find in cruise missiles being fielded by European allies. But this unusual platform isn’t just a missile… It’s a missile that carries and fires its own air-to-air missiles. 

Check out our previous coverage of Longshot: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xo1L1o0P-FA
